dateLabel - Variable in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.AddAppointmentForm
label for date selection
datePicker - Variable in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.AddAppointmentForm
date picker for selecting appointment date
deleteAllAppointmentsForCustomer(int) - Static method in class com.ogborn.c868final.DAO.AppointmentDAO
Deletes all appointments for a specific customer from the database.
deleteAppointment(int) - Static method in class com.ogborn.c868final.DAO.AppointmentDAO
deletes an appointment from the database
deleteButton - Variable in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewAppointments
button to delete an appointment
deleteButton - Variable in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewCustomers
Button to delete a customer.
deleteCustomer(int) - Static method in class com.ogborn.c868final.DAO.CustomerDAO
deletes a customer from the database in order to delete the customer, all appointments must be deleted first so this method checks for and deletes customer's appointments and then proceeds to delete the customer
descriptionColumn - Variable in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewAppointments
column displaying appointment descriptions
descriptionField - Variable in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.AddAppointmentForm
text field for description
descriptionLabel - Variable in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.AddAppointmentForm
label for description
Division - Class in com.ogborn.c868final.Model
Represents a first-level division (e.g., state, province) with an ID, name, and associated country ID.
Division(int, String, int) - Constructor for class com.ogborn.c868final.Model.Division
Constructs a new Division with the specified ID, name, and associated country ID.
divisionColumn - Variable in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewCustomers
TableColumn displaying customer divisions.
DivisionDAO - Class in com.ogborn.c868final.DAO
handles database access and operations involving first-level division objects
